serverInfo.name: token-lens-mcp

serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: audit_context_budget
tools.description: Analyze token cost of MCP tool definitions with context window percentages

tools.name: optimize_tool_loading
tools.description: Recommend minimal tool set for a given task using keyword and category matching

tools.description: Compress verbose tool schemas at light/medium/aggressive levels

tools.name: analyze_session_usage
tools.description: Track loaded vs actually-called tools per session with waste reports

tools.name: suggest_removals
tools.description: Identify removal candidates from usage history (never used, stale, rare)

tools.name: get_optimization_report
tools.description: Full context window health check with executive summary and projected savings

resources.description: Best practices for reducing MCP context window token bloat
